headline: RTX Corporation (RTX) Secures $3.8 Billion Contract Modification for Lots 18-19 of F135 Engine
summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) is among the 12 Best Aerospace Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 31, the company announced that its Pratt & Whitney business had secured a $3.8 billion contract modification for lots 18-19 of the F135 engine, which is used by the F-35 Lightning II. The press release said that the modification […]

headline: Pentagon-Linked REalloys Secures U.S. Rare Earth Supply Ahead of China Ban
summary: REalloys has secured a domestic rare earth supply agreement to help build a China-free U.S. defense metals supply chain ahead of a 2027 ban on Chinese-origin materials.
